[212:54]should troops approach where they are being held.

[213:46]Of course, on October 7th, you have the al-Aqsa Flood operation.

[214:07]takes over a hundred hostages,

[214:24]It's about the size of Manhattan in New York City.

[214:42]So all of the people all of the goods all of the material that enters and exits Gaza is tightly controlled on that small border

[215:18]Intense air raids, indiscriminate bombing
